title: Generate Registration Codes Request
description: Schema for generating multiple random registration codes.

count.description: Number of codes to generate. The effective upper bound is enforced server-side by RegistrationCodeService (REGISTRATION_CODE_REQUEST_MAX) and surfaced to clients as config.generate_max, so the schema intentionally does not hardcode a maximum.

group_ids.description: IDs of the groups to associate with all generated codes. Each code grants every listed group; the first is stored as the primary group.
